allow: PowerShell(node scripts/db-inspect.mjs; npx playwright test 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const { neon } = require\('@neondatabase/serverless'\); const sql = neon\(process.env.DATABASE_URL\); \(async \(\) => { const cols = await sql`select column_name from information_schema.columns where table_name='event_log'`; console.log\('columnas:', cols.map\(c=>c.column_name\).join\(', '\)\); const trg = await sql`select tgname from pg_trigger where not tgisinternal`; console.log\('triggers:', trg.map\(t=>t.tgname\).join\(', '\) || '\(ninguno\)'\); const mig = await sql`select hash, created_at from drizzle.__drizzle_migrations order by created_at`; console.log\('migraciones aplicadas:', mig.length\); }\)\(\)")
